introSection: Untamed is a steel roller coaster located at Canobie Lake Park in Salem, New Hampshire, USA. The ride opened on June 11, 2011.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Untamed is a Gerstlauer Model 320+ Euro-Fighter installation.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The cars are shaped like grizzly bears.

fullText:
Untamed is a steel roller coaster located at Canobie Lake Park in Salem, New Hampshire, USA. The ride opened on June 11, 2011.

Untamed opened on June 11, 2011.

Untamed is a Gerstlauer Model 320+ Euro-Fighter installation.

The cars are shaped like grizzly bears.
